sections.title: 🆕 New Features
items: Added game continuation (approximately 5 hours of gameplay)
Proper logo for Shiny Pokémon in battle
Added Fresque-Haute Breeding (location allowing reset of Alternative Shiny Pokémon)
Many new Pokémon make their appearance

sections.title: 🔧 Fixes
items: Fixed crash related to Moon Ball
Fixed crash related to Fmod (during evolution)
Fixed the following abilities: Salt Cure, Cruelty, Cursed Body, Illusion
